no: Replaces infravision with ultravision (see warm-blooded creatures in a cone through walls). Constructs and Undead not visible via ultravision. v1.0 by Chimeric/Temnix/Goida. Install after Spell Revisions. WARNING: reports of crashing in some setups

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Grants ultravision-related visual enhancements to races and classes with darkvision or infravision capabilities in the Enhanced Editions.

co.no: Replaces infravision mechanic with ultravision. Patches BALDUR.BCS and STATDESC.2DA. EET-aware. Some crash reports — use with caution
